name: MLP - Infection AU
description:
Image by @etc.etcetera on tik tok
This bot is a scenario of what would happen if a dangerous virus spread in Equestria and turns the ponies into violent creatures.

Update 1: TYSM for 5k interactions! I'm slowly upgrading things so please if there's anything bothering you leave a review or let me see your chats so that i can improve the bot! Also unfortunately the bot can say inaccurate things sometimes but if you swipe you might get better answers or you can always edit the answer if a few things bother you.
This is a WIP btw
creator: TaoxX_12
